reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the 2004 film that used Bokor Hill Station as a location.
2. Determine which horror film set in 1972 Vietnam matches that film and return the title.
original_final_question: What horror movie set in 1972 Vietnam was filmed in part in Bokor Hill Station? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which 2004 film used Bokor Hill Station as a location? Evidence: Bokor Hill Station: It was used as the location for the final showdown of the movie "City of Ghosts" (2002) and the 2004 film "R-Point". -> R-Point

Node 2: Which horror film set in 1972 Vietnam matches that Bokor Hill Station film? Evidence: R-Point: R-Point is a 2004 Korean horror film written and directed by Kong Su-chang. Set in 1972 Vietnam, during the Vietnam War, it stars Kam Woo-sung and Son Byong-ho as members of the South Korean military in Vietnam. -> R-Point
